package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for uuid_hash_formatting_only_for_logs: hash-style formatting is done only to build log strings in a loop.
type CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

func PositiveUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogs(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsDTO) error {
    for _, item := range items {
        logLine := fmt.Sprintf("request=%s hash=%x amount=%d", item.ID, item.Payload, item.Amount)
        c.Set(item.ID, logLine)
    }
    return nil
}
